1.speaker: You
1.text: Is that what I think it is?

3.speaker: You
3.text: The big glowing ball of heat in the sky!

4.2.speaker: You
4.2.text: No! The other big glowing ball of heat in the sky!

5.speaker: Crab
5.text: Oh yes. That one. I remember it quite well.

6.speaker: Crab
6.text: We should probably get going now.
